message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This is a cover page for Hitachi water-cooled low-temperature screw chiller technical documentation. It displays the product name, brand, standard cooling capacity range, a list of model numbers, a photo of the chiller unit, a close-up of the screw compressor rotors, and descriptive text about the unit's applications and features.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Main Title (Chinese)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Brand Name (HITACHI)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Standard Cooling Capacity Range"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Technical Data Section Header"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Model Number List"},
    {"type": "image", "label": "Chiller Unit Photo"},
    {"type": "image", "label": "Screw Compressor Rotors Close-up"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Descriptive Text Paragraph"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Website Watermark"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["product_identification", "specifications", "component_visualization", "application_context"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "日立牌水冷低温螺杆式冷水机组
HITACHI
标准制冷量范围
65kW to 396kW
56,000kcal/h to 340,500kcal/h
技术资料 I
型号: RCU 40SCL
RCU 50SCL
RCU 60SCL
RCU 80SCL
RCU100SCL
RCU120SCL
RCU150SCL
RCU180SCL
RCU200SCL
RCU240SCL
日立牌水冷低温螺杆式冷水机组，可用于冷冻液出口温度-15～+5℃时，特别适用于冷冻加工
业、化学工业、冰蓄冷空调、制冰工业等空调产业。该机组使用了最先进的“日立”半封闭
式螺杆压缩机，其特点是结构简单，减少了如活塞，阀门，油泵及容量控制等机械部件。因
而使该机种噪音低，振动小，长时间运行可靠性高，安装容易。该种冷水机组由压缩机，冷
凝器、干式膨胀式蒸发器、热力膨胀阀、及一些控制系统组成，机器的操作非常简单。
制冷百家网：www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The exact relationship between the listed models and the specific cooling capacities is not visually mapped on this page. The descriptive text mentions components like condenser and evaporator, but they are not individually labeled in the provided images.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This is a cover page for Hitachi water-cooled low-temperature screw chiller technical documentation. It displays the product name, brand, standard cooling capacity range, a list of model numbers, a photo of the chiller unit, a close-up of the screw compressor rotors, and descriptive text about the unit's applications and features.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
日立牌水冷低温螺杆式冷水机组
HITACHI
标准制冷量范围
65kW to 396kW
56,000kcal/h to 340,500kcal/h
技术资料 I
型号: RCU 40SCL
RCU 50SCL
RCU 60SCL
RCU 80SCL
RCU100SCL
RCU120SCL
RCU150SCL
RCU180SCL
RCU200SCL
RCU240SCL
日立牌水冷低温螺杆式冷水机组，可用于冷冻液出口温度-15～+5℃时，特别适用于冷冻加工
业、化学工业、冰蓄冷空调、制冰工业等空调产业。该机组使用了最先进的“日立”半封闭
式螺杆压缩机，其特点是结构简单，减少了如活塞，阀门，油泵及容量控制等机械部件。因
而使该机种噪音低，振动小，长时间运行可靠性高，安装容易。该种冷水机组由压缩机，冷
凝器、干式膨胀式蒸发器、热力膨胀阀、及一些控制系统组成，机器的操作非常简单。
制冷百家网：www.zhilengbj.cn
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The exact relationship between the listed models and the specific cooling capacities is not visually mapped on this page. The descriptive text mentions components like condenser and evaporator, but they are not individually labeled in the provided images.
